themes.name: midnight_arcade
themes.description: Dark game theme: deep navy background, glowing teal accent, large clickable elements, HUD-style number displays. Best for: games, clickers, arcades, anything playful and dark.

themes.name: clean_slate
themes.description: Clean professional light theme: white surfaces, indigo accent, subtle shadows, data-friendly tables. Best for: dashboards, admin panels, SaaS tools, business sites.

themes.name: paper_press
themes.description: Warm editorial theme: cream background, serif headings, generous whitespace, understated elegance. Best for: portfolios, blogs, restaurants, articles, personal sites.

themes.name: neon_grid
themes.description: Cyberpunk dark theme: near-black background, magenta and cyan glow, monospace flavor, grid lines. Best for: tech demos, crypto, cyber, hacker aesthetics, futuristic apps.

themes.name: soft_pop
themes.description: Playful light theme: soft pastel background, rounded corners everywhere, bouncy buttons, coral accent. Best for: kids apps, pet sites, quizzes, fun tools, cheerful brands.
